note: Frozen eval set for Module 6 Track A. References the real seeded orders (seed_data.py). Expectations are intentionally TIME-STABLE: no case depends on the wall clock relative to the 14-day returns / 30-day dispute windows. Positive returnable/refund cases are omitted on purpose because their outcome flips as 'now' advances past the seed dates (placed 2026-06-10 etc.) — a frozen baseline must not silently change verdict over time. Run against a live GraphQL server (or inject FakeClient tools in tests). Rule expectations are matched against the retrieved decision dict (any tool's data containing the given field=value).

cases.message: What is the commission on ORD-4001?
I want a refund on ORD-4002
I want to open a dispute for ORD-4002
